today.name: Queens of the Stone Age: The Catacombs Tour
today.description: Alternative rock band Queens of the Stone Age bring their Catacombs Tour to Seattle with special guest Libby Grace. Reserved seated show.

today.name: Bush - The Land of Milk and Honey Tour
today.description: British rock band Bush performs on their Land of Milk and Honey Tour with special guests Mammoth and James and the Cold Gun.

today.name: Seattle Storm vs. Portland Fire (Preseason)
today.description: WNBA preseason basketball as the Seattle Storm host the Portland Fire. The Storm tip off their 2026 preseason campaign at home.

today.name: The Cribs with Beverly Crusher
today.description: Indie rock band The Cribs perform with local support from Beverly Crusher at this intimate Ballard venue.

today.name: Karrin Allyson
today.description: Grammy-nominated jazz vocalist and pianist Karrin Allyson performs at Seattle's premier jazz club.

this_weekend.name: Charlie Puth: Whatever's Clever! World Tour
this_weekend.description: Pop superstar Charlie Puth brings his Whatever's Clever! World Tour to Seattle with special guests Daniel Seavey and Ally Salort.

this_weekend.name: Seattle Mariners vs. Kansas City Royals
this_weekend.description: MLB weekend series as the Seattle Mariners host the Kansas City Royals for three games at T-Mobile Park.

this_weekend.name: Seattle Black Film Festival
this_weekend.description: The 23rd annual Seattle Black Film Festival showcases 55+ films celebrating Black storytelling, creativity, and community. Features films across genres that pulse with Black music, creativity, and resilience.

this_weekend.name: Jesus Christ Superstar
this_weekend.description: The iconic rock opera Jesus Christ Superstar comes to the Moore Theatre, telling the story of the final weeks of Jesus Christ's life.

this_weekend.name: Carmen
this_weekend.description: The classic opera Carmen performed at Seattle's historic 5th Avenue Theatre.

this_weekend.name: Treaty Oak Revival with William Clark Green
this_weekend.description: Country and red dirt music fans gather for Treaty Oak Revival with special guest William Clark Green.

this_weekend.name: Asian American Native Hawaiian Pacific Islander Heritage Month Celebration
this_weekend.description: Part of Seattle Center Festál, this free cultural festival celebrates AANHPI Heritage Month with live performances, cultural demonstrations, vendor marketplaces, and family activities.

this_weekend.name: Grease - The Musical
this_weekend.description: Take a rollicking trip back to the 1950s with the cast of Grease as they navigate the social waters of high school and love. Running at Village Theatre in Issaquah.

this_weekend.name: Seattle Restaurant Week
this_weekend.description: Get special deals at over 220 restaurants from Seattle to Issaquah and Edmonds to Rainier Beach. Special prix fixe menus at participating locations.
